title: Glass Drops Always
description: Recover your glass blocks and panes instantly. No Silk Touch required. Lightweight and server-friendly.
body:
# Glass Drops Always Recover your glass. Always. No exceptions. ![Glass breaks without SilkTouch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1fde075e9aeaa096bf75ec98422ef1c2857d9b7.png) --- ### 💎 Why do you need this? Ever misplaced a glass block in your perfect build and had to break it, losing it forever? Or had to wait until you found a *Silk Touch* book just to redecorate your windows? **Glass Drops Always** is a simple Quality of Life (QoL) mod that solves this frustration. It turns glass into a forgiving, reusable block. --- ### ✨ Features #### 1. Break and Recover You no longer need special tools. Break any glass block with your hand, a pickaxe, or any item, and you will get the drop 100% of the time. #### 2. Full Color Compatibility Works seamlessly with: * Regular Glass * Glass Panes * Tinted Glass (All colors) * Tinted Panes --- ### 🔧 Technical Details * **Lightweight:** The mod only modifies loot tables/drop events. It adds zero load to your client or server. * **Plug & Play:** Just install it and it works. No configuration files required. * **Server Friendly:** If installed on a server, players don't strictly need it on their client (though it is recommended for synchronization). ### 📥 Installation 1. Download the `.jar` file matching your Minecraft version. 2. Drag and drop it into your `mods` folder. 3. Enjoy building without fear! ---

If you found this mod helpful, please follow the project for future updates!
